content.query:
--create external tables using cetas

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE serverless_ext_table_cetas
WITH
(
    LOCATION='output',
    DATA_SOURCE=serverless_ext_data_source_,
    FILE_FORMAT=serverless_ext_file_format_parquet
)
AS
SELECT
EMPLOYEEID,NAME,AGE,SALARY,DEPARTMENT,HIREDATE,CAST(Skills AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS Skills
FROM
OPENROWSET
(
    BULK 'data2',
    DATA_SOURCE='serverless_ext_data_source_',
    FORMAT='PARQUET'
) 
AS QUERY2

SELECT * FROM serverless_ext_table_cetas
